screens.name: projects/9884415059820275587/screens/97dca0420db04cddadb4cf3686b8eb2e
screens.title: Abstract digital landscape representing deep learning and AI. Bioluminescent coral-like structures and glowing data nodes in a deep underwater abyss. High-contrast indigo and obsidian background with soft cyan and lavender light trails. Minimalist and cinematic, matching the aesthetic of {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_13}}.

screens.name: projects/9884415059820275587/screens/c43e776e4e12452fb105857d5665a2b1
screens.title: A cinematic, high-fidelity hero image for an educational AI platform. A glowing, bioluminescent jellyfish-like structure representing a network of knowledge, floating in a deep midnight-blue oceanic void. Soft light rays filtering from above. High-contrast, ethereal, and premium, matching the style of {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_13}}.

screens.name: projects/9884415059820275587/screens/76988b404ed741a29e368b86798b2ddf
screens.title: A cinematic, high-fidelity hero image for an educational AI dashboard. A lone figure looking through a telescope at a glowing, star-filled midnight sky. Deep indigo and obsidian color palette with glowing teal and cyan celestial nodes and connecting lines. Style is ethereal, high-contrast, and premium, matching {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_8}}.

screens.name: projects/9884415059820275587/screens/e1d5a29c93144e2ea75d0b50bd8d0e5b
screens.title: Abstract digital landscape representing AI and learning. Flowing data streams and glowing geometric nodes in a deep midnight void.
